query:
SELECT la.id, la.labelCode, la.productId, la.batch, la.expiryDate,
       p.sku AS productSku, p.name AS productName
FROM labelAssociations la
LEFT JOIN products p ON la.productId = p.id
WHERE la.labelCode = '0633930225'
LIMIT 10;
